23.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
23.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

23.gl: properly, a place of refuge; abstract, safety, both the fact (security) and the feeling (trust); often (adverb with or without preposition) safely
23.kj: assurance, boldly, (without) care(-less), confidence, hope, safe(-ly, -ty), secure, surely.
lean, lie, rely, rest (on, self), stay.

24.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
24.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
24.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

24.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
24.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
24.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

24.gl: a stream (as flowing); also an ear of grain (as growing out); by analogy, a branch
24.kj: branch, channel, ear (of corn), (water-)flood, Shibboleth. Compare H5451 (סִבֹּלֶת).
24.dv: or (feminine) שִׁבֹּלֶת; from the same as H7640 (שֹׁבֶל);

24.gl: to draw together, i.e. close; by implication, to leap (by contracting the limbs); specifically, to die (from gathering up the feet)
24.kj: shut (up), skip, stop, take out of the way.

24.gl: a little or few (often adverbial or compar.)
24.kj: almost (some, very) few(-er, -est), lightly, little (while), (very) small (matter, thing), some, soon, [idiom] very.

25.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
25.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

25.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
25.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
25.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

25.gl: a word; collectively, a discourse; figuratively, a topic
25.kj: [phrase] answer, by-word, matter, any thing (what) to say, to speak(-ing), speak, talking, word.
25.dv: from H4448 (מָלַל) (plural masculine as if from מִלֶּה;

25.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
25.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

25.gl: to lie (i.e. deceive), literally or figuratively
25.kj: fail, (be found a, make a) liar, lie, lying, be in vain.

25.gl: strictly a demonstrative particle, here; but used of time, now or then
